name: Eadies Cream Cheese Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cream cheese, unsalted butter, light, salted butter, and sugars until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract to the mixture and combine thoroughly.
3. Whisk together the dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually fold the dry mixture into the cream cheese mixture until well combined.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts and chocolate chips (if using).
6. Shape the dough into cookies and place them on a lined baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
